## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve or what feature does it add?

## Type of Change

- [ ] New integration
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New core server tool
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] Affected servers start without errors (`node servers/<name>/index.js`)
- [ ] New MCP tools use Zod schemas with `.max()` constraints
- [ ] FTS queries use `sanitizeFtsQuery()` from `servers/db.js`
- [ ] New env vars added to `.env.example`
- [ ] Skill file created/updated in `skills/`
- [ ] Trigger row added to `skills/superpowers.md` (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed

## Breaking Changes

Describe any breaking changes, or write "None".
